_about: Declared migrations + retirements for NONCOMPLIANT repo labels (live on GitHub but absent from labels.json). gh-issues-sync.py --labels, for each repo label not in labels.json: (1) if it appears in `aliases` it MIGRATES (relabel every issue/PR carrying it to the target, then delete the stale label); (2) else if it appears in `retire` it is RETIRED (deleted ONLY when it carries no issues/PRs — a retired-but-still-used label is FLAGGED, never silently dropped, G2); (3) otherwise it is FLAGGED, never silently deleted. An alias WINS over retire (migrating preserves the label↔issue link). Each entry is a ratified decision, not a guess.
